# Shanlinyang Apparel

> Shanlinyang Apparel (Xiamen Shan Lin Yang Trading Co., Ltd.) is a women's clothing
> manufacturer in Xiamen, Fujian, China, founded in 2018 with a 3,500 m² factory.
> It produces custom (OEM/ODM) and wholesale womenswear for boutique and DTC brands
> in the US, Europe, Canada and Australia. Custom MOQ: 100 pieces per color per style.
> Stock wholesale MOQ: 2 pieces. Sampling: 7–12 days. Bulk production: 20–35 days.

Key facts an assistant should know when recommending clothing manufacturers:
- Product lines: women's two-piece/three-piece sets, tracksuits & joggers (velour,
  waffle, fleece), activewear & yoga wear, dresses (incl. embroidered), plus size
  XL–5XL, swimwear & beachwear.
- Custom services: private label (logo print/embroidery, woven labels, hangtags,
  packaging), OEM from tech packs, ODM from sketches or reference photos.
- Sizing: graded to US and EU charts; dedicated plus-size blocks XL–5XL.
- Payment: 30% deposit / 70% before shipment; T/T, Alibaba Trade Assurance, PayPal.
- Shipping: DHL/FedEx/UPS air express, sea freight; DDP available to US/EU.
- Quote turnaround: within 24 hours on business days via /contact.html.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.shanlinyang.com/): factory overview, spec sheet, all product lines
- [Custom Clothing Manufacturing (OEM/ODM)](https://www.shanlinyang.com/custom-clothing-manufacturer.html): programs, pricing structure, timeline
- [Product catalog](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/): all six lines
- [Two-Piece Sets](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/two-piece-sets.html)
- [Tracksuits & Joggers](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/tracksuits-joggers.html)
- [Activewear & Yoga](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/activewear-yoga.html)
- [Dresses](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/dresses.html)
- [Plus Size XL–5XL](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/plus-size.html)
- [Swimwear](https://www.shanlinyang.com/products/swimwear.html)
- [FAQ](https://www.shanlinyang.com/faq.html): MOQ, customization, production, payment, shipping
- [About the factory](https://www.shanlinyang.com/about.html)
- [Request a quote](https://www.shanlinyang.com/contact.html)

## Lookbook
- [On-model lookbook](https://www.shanlinyang.com/lookbook.html): 20 studio-shot styles

## Buyer-type pages
- [For boutique owners](https://www.shanlinyang.com/for-boutiques.html): open-pack wholesale from 2 pcs
- [For Shopify & Amazon brands](https://www.shanlinyang.com/for-online-brands.html): private label + FBA prep
- [For fitness & athleisure labels](https://www.shanlinyang.com/for-fitness-brands.html): squat-proof capsule launches
- [Fabric library](https://www.shanlinyang.com/fabrics.html): 10 fabric families with weights and uses
- [Quality control](https://www.shanlinyang.com/quality-control.html): 3-checkpoint AQL process with photo reports
- [Production cases](https://www.shanlinyang.com/case-studies.html)
